final:
module top_module(
	input  D0, D1,
	input  S0,
	output Y
);assign Y = S0 ? D1 : D0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= ~S0 & D0; // Misleading behavior opposite to the intended functionality
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Y <= ~S0 & D0; // Misleading behavior opposite to the intended functionality
